name: Adrián Infantes Romero
role: AI Red Teamer | ML Security Engineer | Secure GenAI Architect
text:
I evaluate how AI systems fail under pressure before attackers do.

My work focuses on prompt injection, jailbreaks, agent abuse, data exfiltration paths, and adversarial ML risks across LLM, RAG, and hybrid AI systems.

At BBVA's Financial Intelligence Unit, I design and harden AI systems for sensitive, regulated environments where model behavior, access boundaries, and operational resilience matter as much as accuracy.

I combine offensive security thinking with ML engineering: building evals, testing attack paths, shipping mitigations, and turning security findings into production controls.
quote: AI systems are only useful if they remain controllable under adversarial pressure.

specialization.text: AI Security Evals for Regulated Environments

goals.text: Lead AI Red Team and ML Security programs in high-risk environments
Publish security research, evals, and offensive AI tooling
Advance OWASP LLM and MITRE ATLAS-aligned AI security practices
